posts.author: not_lad (Dalton)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When will sidekick be able to build widgets/dashboards for us?

Why is there a tool that helps you build with non-native code (Vibe) but not a tool that helps you build with native code?

Why not add widget building to sidekick before building an AI tool that does even more? Buying a vibe add-on plan should be like you said, only for people looking for capabilities beyond native functionality. But instead, anyone who wants automation help for widget building, dashboard building, etc. needs an add-on plan.

Magic doesn’t cut it either. You can’t use magic on already-built boards.

Might I suggest Monday.com starts with widget building assistance. For those of us who spend most of their day building in Monday.com, we would like tools that help us rather than tools that remove us from the process.

What are you trying to achieve

Widget and Dashboard AI assistance that isn’t an upsell
